headline: Piper Sandler Reiterates Overweight on Tyson Foods, Lowers Price Target to $78
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Michael Lavery   reiterates Tyson Foods (NYSE:TSN) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $80 to $78.
